evidence.title: #teacher #parenting #future #mentalhealth #children #like #love #inspiration #selfcare #motivation #mindfulness #healing #gratitude #life | Gavin ❤️ McCormack | 107 comments
evidence.description: No matter what life throws at us, no matter how hard it may be, no matter how much others want you to stop educating the children of tomorrow......... Remember, just like this lady, you’re a teacher and nothing, absolutely nothing is going to get in the way of you giving those children the best chance possible. ‘It’s your duty, it’s your passion, it’s the reason you are who you are, for you are a teacher.’ Sometimes heroes don’t wear capes. They read books, carry chalkboard dusters and they educate from the heart. Purpose + intention = impact ❤️ #teacher #parenting #future #mentalhealth #children #like #love #inspiration #selfcare #motivation #mindfulness #healing #gratitude #life | 107 comments on LinkedIn
evidence.text:
No matter what life throws at us, no matter how hard it may be, no matter how much others want you to stop educating the children of tomorrow......... Remember, just like this lady, you’re a teacher and nothing, absolutely nothing is going to get in the way of you giving those children the best chance possible. ‘It’s your duty, it’s your passion, it’s the reason you are who you are, for you are a teacher.’ Sometimes heroes don’t wear capes. They read books, carry chalkboard dusters and they educate from the heart. Purpose + intention = impact ❤️ #teacher #parenting #future #mentalhealth #children #like #love #inspiration #selfcare #motivation #mindfulness #healing #gratitude #life

evidence.page_title: Perspective brings appreciation….. | Nuala Penpraze - LinkedIn
evidence.title: Perspective brings appreciation….. | Nuala Penpraze
evidence.text:
Perspective brings appreciation…..
No matter what life throws at us, no matter how hard it may be, no matter how much others want you to stop educating the children of tomorrow......... Remember, just like this lady, you’re a teacher and nothing, absolutely nothing is going to get in the way of you giving those children the best chance possible. ‘It’s your duty, it’s your passion, it’s the reason you are who you are, for you are a teacher.’ Sometimes heroes don’t wear capes. They read books, carry chalkboard dusters and they educate from the heart. Purpose + intention = impact ❤️ #teacher #parenting #future #mentalhealth #children #like #love #inspiration #selfcare #motivation #mindfulness #healing #gratitude #life
